1505.bio: He stayed in Makkah after second Aqaba and migrated with Prophet(ﷺ). Therefore he was called Muhajri Ansar.

1510.full_name: Mu'adh bin Ma'is b. Qays b. Khalada b.'Amir b. Zurayq b. 'Amir b. Zurayq b. 'Abdu Haritha b. Malik
1510.father_name: Ma'is b. Qays b. Khalada b.'Amir b. Zurayq
1510.bio:
Full Lineage: Mu'adh bin Ma'is b. Qays b. Khalada b. 'Amir b. Zurayq b. 'Amir b. Zurayq b. 'Abdu Haritha b. Malik b. Ghadb b. Jushum b. al-Khazraj(br>
The Brotherhood was made b/w him and Salim Mawla Abi Hudayfa.
1510.spouses: Umm Thabit bint 'Ubaid b. Wahb of Ashja'

1511.full_name: 'Aidh bin Ma'is b. Qays b. Khalada b.'Amir b. Zurayq b. 'Amir b. Zurayq b. 'Abdu Haritha b. Malik
1511.father_name: Ma'is b. Qays b. Khalada b.'Amir b. Zurayq
1511.bio:
Full Lineage: 'Aidh bin Ma'is b. Qays b. Khalada b. 'Amir b. Zurayq b. 'Amir b. Zurayq b. 'Abdu Haritha b. Malik b. Ghadb b. Jushum b. al-Khazraj
According to some other sources, He was martyred in the battle of Yamama. The Brotherhood was made b/w him and Suyabit bin Harmala.

1512.full_name: Mas'ud bin Sa'd b. Qays b. Khalada b.'Amir b. Zurayq b. 'Amir b. Zurayq b. 'Abdu Haritha b. Malik
1512.father_name: Sa'd b. Qays b. Khalada b.'Amir b. Zurayq

Full Lineage: Mas'ud bin Sa'd b. Qays b. Khalada b. 'Amir b. Zurayq b. 'Amir b. Zurayq b. 'Abdu Haritha b. Malik b. Ghadb b. Jushum b. al-Khazraj
According to some other sources, he was martyred at Khaybar.
